blended.narrative: Mt. Ashland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 6".
